meaning: n.[宗]雅亿(<<圣经>>中杀死来帐篷避难的Sisera 的希伯来妇人)
examples: Jael went out to meet Sisera and said to him, "come, my Lord, come right in. Don't be afraid."
Barak came by in pursuit of Sisera, and Jael went out to meet him. "Come," she said, "I will show you the man you're looking for."
Barak came by in pursuit of Sisera, and Jael went out to meet him. "Come," she said, I will show you the man you're looking for.
